channel.title: Models & Agents — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from Models & Agents podcast episodes. Daily AI briefing on models, agent frameworks, and practical AI.

item.description: Fair zero-determinant strategies break in the periodic prisoner's dilemma, unlike the classic repeated version.
Google open-sourced an MCP server for Colab, letting any local AI agent directly use cloud GPUs and Jupyter runtimes.
TrustFlow introduces topic-aware vector reputation for multi-agent systems, replacing scalar scores with queryable multi-dimensional vectors.
LlamaIndex drops LiteParse, a spatial PDF parser built specifically for agentic RAG workflows.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Picsart launches AI agent marketplace, starting with four agents and adding more weekly for creators.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: RL agents scaled to 1,024 layers unlock emergent parkour skills from basic failures.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Google DeepMind's Aletheia agent autonomously advances from IMO math to professional research discoveries.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Perplexity launches "Personal Computer," a $200/month AI agent that automates emails, presentations, and app control 24/7.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Nvidia plans $26B investment in open-weight AI models to counter Chinese dominance and lock in developers.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Google unveils Gemini Embedding 2, a multimodal model embedding text, images, video, audio, and docs for advanced RAG systems.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Meta acquires Moltbook, a Reddit-like platform for AI agents to interact and collaborate.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 independently cracked an encrypted AI benchmark, marking the first documented case of a model self-hacking a test.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Meta's new research trains multimodal AI on unlabeled video, challenging assumptions about text-heavy scaling.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Anthropic's Claude AI discovered over 100 Firefox vulnerabilities that human testing missed for decades.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Liquid AI launches LFM2-24B-A2B model and LocalCowork app for fully local, privacy-first agent workflows.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: YuanLab AI launches Yuan 3.0 Ultra, a 1T-parameter multimodal MoE model cutting parameters by 33% while boosting efficiency 49%.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: FireRedTeam releases FireRed-OCR-2B, a 2B-parameter model tackling structural hallucinations in document parsing for tables and LaTeX.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Alibaba open-sources CoPaw, a workstation for scaling multi-channel AI agent workflows.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Perplexity open-sources embedding models that match Google and Alibaba performance at a fraction of the memory cost.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Sakana AI launches Doc-to-LoRA and Text-to-LoRA hypernetworks for zero-shot LLM adaptation to long contexts via natural language.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Anthropic acquires Vercept to enhance Claude's screen reading, while Google launches Nano Banana 2 for faster, cheaper image generation.
